headline: Marathon Petroleum (MPC) Up 12.7% Since Last Earnings Report: Can It Continue?
summary: Marathon Petroleum (MPC) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock? We take a look at earnings estimates for some clues.

headline: Is Marathon Petroleum (MPC) Price Justified After Strong Multi‑Year Share Gains?
summary: If you are wondering whether Marathon Petroleum's current share price lines up with its underlying worth, you are not alone. This article is built to help you weigh that question clearly. The stock recently closed at US$220.77, with returns of 12.8% over 7 days, 24.8% over 30 days, 33.7% year to date, 66.9% over 1 year, 84.2% over 3 years, and a very large gain over 5 years of roughly 3x. Recent news around US refining capacity, fuel demand trends, and shareholder capital returns has put...

headline: Marathon Petroleum (MPC) Is Up 12.8% After Oil-Price Rally Lifts Refiners’ Sentiment – Has The Bull Case Changed?
summary: In early March 2026, Marathon Petroleum gained attention after a rally in the energy sector, as West Texas Intermediate crude oil climbed to an 8.25-month high and lifted sentiment toward oil refiners. Analyst coverage currently leans toward a “Moderate Buy” consensus, highlighting how sector-wide optimism around higher oil prices is influencing views on Marathon Petroleum’s business outlook. headline: Marathon Petroleum (MPC) Valuation Check After Energy Sector Rally And Strong Investor Optimism
summary: Why Marathon Petroleum stock is back in focus Marathon Petroleum (MPC) has drawn fresh attention after its share price climbed more than 5% on March 2, as West Texas Intermediate crude oil rose over 6% to an 8.25 month high. See our latest analysis for Marathon Petroleum. That move fits into a stronger run for the stock, with a 30 day share price return of 24.79% and a year to date share price return of 33.69%. headline: U.S. crude oil tops $79 per barrel after Iran says it attacked a tanker
summary: Oil prices have surged more than 17% this week as the U.S.-Iran war engulfs the Middle East.

headline: Treasury yields move higher amid rising oil and labor costs
summary: U.S. Treasury yields moved higher on Thursday as investors' fears around the U.S.-Iran war eased on assurance that oil shipments will be stabilized.
